arts.ttl: Is THIS the moment that sparked David Raya's incredible double save? Arsenal goalkeeper reveals secrets behind penalty stop after earning Gunners a point in Champions League opener in Atalanta
arts.sum: After a dull first period, Arteta 's side faced an early second-half concession when the referee awarded the home side a penalty following a challenge from Thomas Partey on Ederson .

arts.ttl: Ex-Arsenal striker sacked by club after being charged importing drugs in £600k plot
arts.sum: Jay Emmanuel-Thomas, who began his career as a prospect for Arsenal in 1998, joined Scottish outfit Greenock Morton this summer but the club have terminated his contract after he was charged over an alleged drugs plot

arts.ttl: What Arsenal goalkeeper David Raya did before incredible double-save vs Atalanta
arts.sum: David Raya was spotted in deep conversation with the Arsenal goalkeeper coach shortly before pulling off an unbelievable double-save to deny Atalanta from taking the lead. To join our dedicated Arsenal channel, all you have to do is click this link and you can join thousands of others following our Gunners coverage!

arts.ttl: David Raya’s double save hailed as ‘the best I’ve ever seen’ by Mikel Arteta
arts.sum: Raya saved Mateo Retegui’s penalty then kept out the rebound as the Gunners opened their Champions League campaign with a 0-0 draw at Atalanta

arts.sum: Arsenal manager Mikel Arteta agrees with Fabio Capello on ‘why we signed’ Riccardo Calafiori after...

arts.ttl: Declan Rice names Arsenal star who has gone to the ‘next level’ this season
arts.sum: David Raya kept his fourth clean sheet of the season and made a stunning double save to earn a draw against Atalanta

arts.ttl: Arsenal ratings: David Raya the star in unexciting draw at Atalanta
arts.sum: Arsenal's goalkeeper David Raya was the hero on a dull night in Bergamo, making a brilliant save from a penalty to ensure the Gunners left Atalanta with a point.

arts.ttl: David Raya credits controversial Arsenal coach for "lucky" Atalanta double save
arts.sum: Arsenal goalkeeper David Raya credits controversial Gunners coach Inaki Cana for his astounding double save against Atalanta BC in their 0-0 Champions League draw.

arts.ttl: David Raya's immediate response to incredible double save sums up Arsenal keeper
arts.sum: David Raya was the hero as Arsenal opened up their latest Champions League campaign with a battling draw against Italian side Atalanta as he denied Mateo Retegui from the penalty spot
